scripts.wf7:
node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\"\\x27use client\\x27\",\"import { useState } from \\x27react\\x27\",\"import { executeTrade } from \\x27@/lib/api\\x27\",\"import { usePortfolioStore } from \\x27@/store/portfolioStore\\x27\",\"\",\"export default function TradeBar() {\",\" const [ticker, setTicker] = useState(\\x27\\x27)\",\" const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(\\x271\\x27)\",\" const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ msg: string; ok: boolean } | null>(null)\",\" const refresh = usePortfolioStore((s) => s.refresh)\",\"\",\" async function trade(side: \\x27buy\\x27 | \\x27sell\\x27) {\",\" const t = ticker.trim().toUpperCase()\",\" const q = parseFloat(quantity)\",\" if (!t || isNaN(q) || q <= 0) return\",\" try {\",\" const result = await executeTrade(t, q, side)\",\" if (result.success) {\",\" setStatus({ msg: side.toUpperCase() + \\x27 \\x27 + q + \\x27 \\x27 + t + \\x27 @ $\\x27 + (result.trade?.price?.toFixed(2) ?? \\x27?\\x27) + \\x27 \\u2713\\x27, ok: true })\",\" await refresh()\",\" } else {\",\" setStatus({ msg: result.detail || result.message || \\x27Trade failed\\x27, ok: false })\",\" }\",\" } catch {\",\" setStatus({ msg: \\x27Error executing trade\\x27, ok: false })\",\" }\",\" setTimeout(() => setStatus(null), 4000)\",\" }\",\"\",\" return (\",\"
\",\" setTicker(e.target.value.toUpperCase())} />\",\" setQuantity(e.target.value)} min=\\x270.01\\x27 step=\\x271\\x27 />\",\" \",\" \",\" {status && ({status.msg})}\",\"
\",\" )\",\"}\",\"\"]; fs.writeFileSync(\"components/TradeBar.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"
scripts.wf8a: node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\"\\x27use client\\x27\",\"import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from \\x27react\\x27\",\"import { sendChatMessage } from \\x27@/lib/api\\x27\",\"import { usePortfolioStore } from \\x27@/store/portfolioStore\\x27\",\"\",\"interface TradeResult { ticker: string; side: string; quantity: number; price: number; success: boolean; error?: string }\",\"interface WatchlistResult { ticker: string; action: string; success: boolean }\",\"interface Message { id: string; role: \\x27user\\x27 | \\x27assistant\\x27; content: string; trades?: TradeResult[]; watchlistChanges?: WatchlistResult[] }\",\"\",\"export default function ChatPanel({ collapsed, onToggle }: { collapsed: boolean; onToggle: () => void }) {\",\"  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([\",\"    { id: \\x270\\x27, role: \\x27assistant\\x27, content: \\x27Hello! I\\x5C\\x27m FinAlly, your AI trading assistant. I can analyze your portfolio, suggest trades, and execute them for you. What would you like to explore?\\x27 }\",\"  ])\",\"  const [input, setInput] = useState(\\x27\\x27)\",\"  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\",\"  const scrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)\",\"  const refresh = usePortfolioStore((s) => s.refresh)\",\"\",\"  useEffect(() => {\",\"    if (scrollRef.current) scrollRef.current.scrollTop = scrollRef.current.scrollHeight\",\"  }, [messages])\",\"\"]; fs.writeFileSync(\"components/ChatPanel.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"
scripts.wf8b: node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\" async function send() {\",\" const msg = input.trim()\",\" if (!msg || loading) return\",\" setInput(\\x27\\x27)\",\" setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { id: String(Date.now()), role: \\x27user\\x27, content: msg }])\",\" setLoading(true)\",\" try {\",\" const resp = await sendChatMessage(msg)\",\" setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {\",\" id: String(Date.now() + 1),\",\" role: \\x27assistant\\x27,\",\" content: resp.message,\",\" trades: resp.trades_executed,\",\" watchlistChanges: resp.watchlist_changes,\",\" }])\",\" if ((resp.trades_executed?.length ?? 0) > 0 || (resp.watchlist_changes?.length ?? 0) > 0) await refresh()\",\" } catch {\",\" setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { id: String(Date.now()), role: \\x27assistant\\x27, content: \\x27Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.\\x27 }])\",\" } finally { setLoading(false) }\",\" }\",\"\",\" if (collapsed) {\",\" return (\",\" \",\" )\",\" }\",\"\"]; fs.appendFileSync(\"components/ChatPanel.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"

scripts.wf9a: node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\"\\x27use client\\x27\",\"import { useEffect, useRef, useState, useCallback } from \\x27react\\x27\",\"import { usePriceStore } from \\x27@/store/priceStore\\x27\",\"import { addToWatchlist, getWatchlist, removeFromWatchlist } from \\x27@/lib/api\\x27\",\"\",\"interface WatchlistItem { ticker: string; price: number | null; daily_change_pct: number | null }\",\"\",\"function Sparkline({ history }: { history: number[] }) {\",\"  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)\",\"  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null)\",\"  const seriesRef = useRef<any>(null)\",\"  const initializedRef = useRef(false)\",\"\",\"  useEffect(() => {\",\"    if (!ref.current || initializedRef.current) return\",\"    initializedRef.current = true\",\"    import(\\x27lightweight-charts\\x27).then(({ createChart, ColorType, AreaSeries }) => {\",\"      if (!ref.current) return\",\"      const chart = createChart(ref.current, {\",\"        width: 80, height: 36,\",\"        layout: { background: { type: ColorType.Solid, color: \\x27transparent\\x27 }, textColor: \\x27transparent\\x27 },\",\"        grid: { vertLines: { visible: false }, horzLines: { visible: false } },\",\"        crosshair: { vertLine: { visible: false }, horzLine: { visible: false } },\",\"        rightPriceScale: { visible: false }, leftPriceScale: { visible: false },\",\"        timeScale: { visible: false }, handleScroll: false, handleScale: false,\",\"      })\",\"      let series: any\",\"      if (AreaSeries) {\",\"        series = chart.addSeries(AreaSeries, { lineColor: \\x27#209dd7\\x27, topColor: \\x27rgba(32,157,215,0.25)\\x27, bottomColor: \\x27rgba(32,157,215,0)\\x27, lineWidth: 1 })\",\"      } else {\",\"        series = (chart as any).addAreaSeries({ lineColor: \\x27#209dd7\\x27, topColor: \\x27rgba(32,157,215,0.25)\\x27, bottomColor: \\x27rgba(32,157,215,0)\\x27, lineWidth: 1 })\",\"      }\",\"      chartRef.current = chart\",\"      seriesRef.current = series\",\"    })\",\"    return () => { chartRef.current?.remove(); chartRef.current = null; seriesRef.current = null; initializedRef.current = false }\",\"  }, [])\",\"\",\"  useEffect(() => {\",\"    if (!seriesRef.current || history.length === 0) return\",\"    const data = history.map((price, i) => ({ time: (i + 1) as any, value: price }))\",\"    try { seriesRef.current.setData(data); chartRef.current?.timeScale().fitContent() } catch {}\",\"  }, [history])\",\"\",\"  return <div ref={ref} style={{ width: 80, height: 36, flexShrink: 0 }} />\",\"}\",\"\"]; fs.writeFileSync(\"components/Watchlist.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"
scripts.wf9b: node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\"export default function Watchlist({ selectedTicker, onSelect }: { selectedTicker: string | null; onSelect: (t: string) => void }) {\",\"  const [items, setItems] = useState<WatchlistItem[]>([])\",\"  const [newTicker, setNewTicker] = useState(\\x27\\x27)\",\"  const [adding, setAdding] = useState(false)\",\"  const prices = usePriceStore((s) => s.prices)\",\"  const [flashState, setFlashState] = useState<Record<string, \\x27up\\x27 | \\x27down\\x27 | null>>({})\",\"  const prevPricesRef = useRef<Record<string, number>>({})\",\"\",\"  const load = useCallback(async () => {\",\"    try { const data = await getWatchlist(); setItems(data.watchlist ?? []) } catch {}\",\"  }, [])\",\"\",\"  useEffect(() => { load() }, [load])\",\"\",\"  useEffect(() => {\",\"    const updates: Record<string, \\x27up\\x27 | \\x27down\\x27> = {}\",\"    for (const [ticker, data] of Object.entries(prices)) {\",\"      const prev = prevPricesRef.current[ticker]\",\"      if (prev !== undefined && Math.abs(prev - data.price) > 0.001) updates[ticker] = data.price > prev ? \\x27up\\x27 : \\x27down\\x27\",\"      prevPricesRef.current[ticker] = data.price\",\"    }\",\"    if (Object.keys(updates).length === 0) return\",\"    setFlashState((prev) => ({ ...prev, ...updates }))\",\"    const t = setTimeout(() => setFlashState((prev) => { const next = { ...prev }; for (const k of Object.keys(updates)) next[k] = null; return next }), 500)\",\"    return () => clearTimeout(t)\",\"  }, [prices])\",\"\",\"  async function handleAdd() {\",\"    const t = newTicker.trim().toUpperCase()\",\"    if (!t) return\",\"    setAdding(true)\",\"    try { await addToWatchlist(t); setNewTicker(\\x27\\x27); await load() } catch {} finally { setAdding(false) }\",\"  }\",\"\",\"  async function handleRemove(e: React.MouseEvent, ticker: string) {\",\"    e.stopPropagation(); await removeFromWatchlist(ticker); await load()\",\"  }\",\"\"]; fs.appendFileSync(\"components/Watchlist.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"

scripts.wf10: node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\"import type { Metadata } from \\x27next\\x27\",\"import \\x27./globals.css\\x27\",\"\",\"export const metadata: Metadata = {\",\"  title: \\x27FinAlly \\u2014 AI Trading Workstation\\x27,\",\"  description: \\x27AI-powered trading workstation with live market data\\x27,\",\"}\",\"\",\"export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\",\"  return (\",\"    <html lang=\\x27en\\x27>\",\"      <body style={{ margin: 0, padding: 0, height: \\x27100vh\\x27, overflow: \\x27hidden\\x27, backgroundColor: \\x27#0d1117\\x27 }}>\",\"        {children}\",\"      </body>\",\"    </html>\",\"  )\",\"}\",\"\"]; fs.writeFileSync(\"app/layout.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"
scripts.wf11a: node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),lines=[\"\\x27use client\\x27\",\"import { useEffect, useState } from \\x27react\\x27\",\"import { usePriceStore } from \\x27@/store/priceStore\\x27\",\"import { usePortfolioStore } from \\x27@/store/portfolioStore\\x27\",\"import Header from \\x27@/components/Header\\x27\",\"import Watchlist from \\x27@/components/Watchlist\\x27\",\"import MainChart from \\x27@/components/MainChart\\x27\",\"import PortfolioHeatmap from \\x27@/components/PortfolioHeatmap\\x27\",\"import PnLChart from \\x27@/components/PnLChart\\x27\",\"import PositionsTable from \\x27@/components/PositionsTable\\x27\",\"import TradeBar from \\x27@/components/TradeBar\\x27\",\"import ChatPanel from \\x27@/components/ChatPanel\\x27\",\"\",\"export default function TradingTerminal() {\",\"  const [selectedTicker, setSelectedTicker] = useState<string | null>(\\x27AAPL\\x27)\",\"  const [chatCollapsed, setChatCollapsed] = useState(false)\",\"  const connect = usePriceStore((s) => s.connect)\",\"  const { refresh, refreshHistory } = usePortfolioStore()\",\"\",\"  useEffect(() => {\",\"    connect()\",\"    refresh()\",\"    refreshHistory()\",\"    const interval = setInterval(refreshHistory, 30000)\",\"    return () => clearInterval(interval)\",\"  }, [])\",\"\"]; fs.writeFileSync(\"app/page.tsx\", lines.join(\"\\n\")); console.log(\"ok\");"
